title: Rei I Kaworu connection
wikitext:
[]: Rei I - Kaworu connection?             Quote Post by darth_mark » Mon Jan 09, 2006 3:35 pm ok, so as Naoko is strangling Rei I we see a close up of Rei and apparently she has a vision of Kaworu's face just before she dies, unless I'm misinterpreting the whole scene. After thinking about it for about, oh five minutes ;;, i still can't figure out what were supposed read into this.. I apologize if this has been discussed before, but looking for a thread with Rei and Kaworu is like looking for the proverbial needle in the proverbial haystack.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Jan 09, 2006 4:15 pm I think they'd go good together. I feel that the angel of free will (Tabris a.k.a. Kaworu) should fill in the missing pieces of a girl who seems to have no free will at all.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Jan 09, 2006 7:25 pm I think that the idea is that Rei sees Kaworu coming for her the same way everyone sees Rei coming for them during Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Jan 10, 2006 3:51 pm but the only reason Rei came for everybody during Third Impact was because it was, uhm.. Third Impact and everyone was coming together to become one big sea of tang. I don't see any reason why Kaworu would come for Rei, or even if he did, how was Rei II brought about?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jan 10, 2006 4:27 pm Yea its true Lilith and Adam arn't death, personified. heck Angel boy mayhave not even exsisted at this point. Lets just call it for shadowing and leave it at that.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 10, 2006 4:36 pm darth_mark wrote: I don't see any reason why Kaworu would come for Rei, or even if he did, how was Rei II brought about?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Jan 10, 2006 5:13 pm So does that mean that all of the Rei's have seperate souls seperate from each other and Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Jan 10, 2006 5:24 pm heck Angel boy mayhave not even exsisted at this point. Lets just call it for shadowing and leave it at that.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 10, 2006 5:27 pm SEELE 08 wrote: So does that mean that all of the Rei's have seperate souls seperate from each other and Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jan 10, 2006 5:57 pm I seem to remember Reichu telling me theirs just not enough information given on how a sole works in NGE to answer questions like that.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Jan 10, 2006 6:35 pm Mr. Tines wrote: SEELE 08 wrote: So does that mean that all of the Rei's have seperate souls seperate from each other and Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 11, 2006 3:51 am SEELE 08 wrote: So if they are all sharing the same soul......why would the Eva unit 00 go out of control, in theory Rei should have a perfect synch ration than.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jan 11, 2006 8:02 pm Realy? Liliths sole and adams bodie seemed to work fine for Rei in EoE. . .

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jan 11, 2006 11:01 pm Actually it's more like adam in liliths body at that point :P I agree with the point that lilths soul in adams body = not good news. About the 3 reis would it be possible for there to be 3 differnt souls but all three of them consisting of the same things? Like they both are a mix of lilith and yui, but with differnt amounts of each to create a new soul and differnt soul. Rei III was a total space case compaird to Rei II. Not that Rei II isnt a space case, but she seemed to have more a human soul then Rei III. If anyone gets what I'm saying congrats :P

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Thu Jan 12, 2006 8:42 am Rei III was a total space case compaird to Rei II. Not that Rei II isnt a space case, but she seemed to have more a human soul then Rei III.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jan 12, 2006 12:06 pm But Rei III was missing something, i believe Shinji said something like that, also Rei III didn't have the recent memories of Rei II in the eva battle.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Thu Jan 12, 2006 12:53 pm But Rei III was missing something, i believe Shinji said something like that, also Rei III didn't have the recent memories of Rei II in the eva battle.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 12, 2006 1:28 pm DatDude wrote: Realy? Liliths sole and adams bodie seemed to work fine for Rei in EoE. . .

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jan 12, 2006 1:44 pm and the NGE big books of sole physics conferms your theory?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jan 13, 2006 4:37 pm darth_mark wrote: i think they could only "upload" all but the most recent memories, or maybe her memories were still all jumbled up, i seem to recall she was started crying when she saw gendo's glasses in her room but couldn't quite figure out why. i think given time she would've gotten as close to "normal" as Rei II did.
summary: []: Rei I - Kaworu connection?             Quote Post by darth_mark » Mon Jan 09, 2006 3:35 pm ok, so as Naoko is strangling Rei I we see a close up of Rei and apparently she has a vision of Kaworu's face just before she dies, unless I'm misinterpreting the whole scene. After thinking about it for about, oh five minutes ;;, i still can't figure out what were supposed read into this.. I apologize if this has been discussed before
